name: Information Triage
description: Process high-volume feeds rapidly by classifying items on signal strength × relevance to route attention where it creates most value.

name: Weak Signal Detection
description: Identify early-stage indicators of emerging trends by monitoring anomalous patterns at the periphery of mainstream discourse.

name: Progressive Distillation
description: Compress source material through staged passes — capture → bold → extract → implication → connect — so knowledge becomes more actionable each time.

name: Cross-Domain Synthesis
description: Strip domain-specific language to find transferable mechanisms, then apply source-domain solutions to target-domain problems.

name: Intelligence Briefing Craft
description: Write actionable briefings using key-judgment-first structure, explicit confidence levels, and implication framing from intelligence tradecraft.
